title: Mayor Owens Announces Search for New Commissioner of Finance
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced a search for a new Commissioner of Finance, the City's chief fiscal officer responsible for financial management, revenue collection, treasury operations, accounting, debt management, payroll, and financial reporting. Diane Nastri, Assistant Director of Accounting, was appointed Interim Commissioner effective March 4, 2026. Applications close March 30, 2026.

political_signal.description: Leadership transition in key fiscal management position signals mayoral focus on financial stewardship and operational continuity through interim appointment during search.

processing_notes: Author listed as 'Unknown' — standard for official city press releases
No budget figures or financial projections mentioned
Job description link provided but not accessible in press release text
Department structure clearly articulated: City Payment Center, Bureau of Accounts, Bureau of Financial Operations
Timeline: Interim appointment March 4, application deadline March 30 — 7-week search window
